# TruckElectric

## Tags
delivery, van, shipping, haulage, lorry, electric

## Categories
transportation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/truck-electric)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TruckElectric;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TruckElectric { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
